description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a casual urban appearance, featuring a short-sleeved, V-neck tunic top with a fitted waist and a slightly flared hem. The figure wears fitted leggings that extend to the ankles, paired with open-toed sandals. The individual has a medium build and stands with arms extended horizontally, suggesting a neutral or T-pose. The face is partially obscured by straight, chin-length hair with bangs, and the figure appears to be wearing glasses. The overall attire and posture suggest a relaxed, everyday city dweller suitable for a variety of urban environments.
description: An adult pedestrian in casual attire, wearing a tunic top, leggings, sandals, and glasses, with straight chin-length hair and a neutral standing pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tunic's neckline, glasses, facial features, and the full frontal detail of the outfit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the hair's length, and the layered look of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tunic, the fit of the leggings, and the back of the sandals and hair.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual tunic top with fitted leggings and open-toed sandals
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
